summary: AfriMarket Phase 2 testing — backend 33/33 pytest tests pass (Messages, Reviews, Disputes, KYC docs+approve/reject, Wallet+withdraw, Click&Collect QR, Geo dashboard, CSV exports). Frontend: Messages, Wallet, KYC steps, Admin Disputes, Admin Geo (5 country cards + 6 charts + toggle + 2 CSV exports) all render with expected data-testids. One real gap found: Seller Dashboard is missing the quick-wallet / quick-scan / quick-kyc quick-action testids.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing required quick-action buttons. data-testids 'quick-wallet', 'quick-scan', 'quick-kyc' are not present in the DOM (verified by enumerating all data-testid attributes on the page). Existing testids: kyc-notice, add-product-quick-btn, recent-order-*, bottom-nav-*. The Phase 2 spec explicitly requires these three quick-action shortcuts on the seller dashboard.

action_items: Add Quick Actions row to /app/frontend/src/pages/seller/Dashboard.jsx with three buttons exposing data-testid='quick-wallet' (-> /seller/wallet), 'quick-scan' (-> /seller/scan), 'quick-kyc' (-> /seller/kyc). All other Phase 2 testids verified present and pages render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 2 routers (messages, reviews, disputes, wallet, sellers/kyc, admin/geo) all return clean JSON without leaking Mongo _id and use proper async/await + Pydantic validation.

Seller wallet withdrawal completes after 2 minutes — implemented by checking pending withdrawals on wallet GET (timer triggered on read). Document this behavior in README for ops; in production should be a background job.
Reviews recompute seller.rating immediately on POST — verified seller rating moved to 5.0 after a fresh 5-star review.
Admin /api/admin/geo/growth returns 6 unique French-labeled month buckets (e.g. 'janv.', 'févr.', ...) — uniqueness asserted in tests.

Click & Collect QR: /api/orders/by-qr/{token} correctly enforces seller-only access (buyer received 403). scan-qr transitions order to collected + escrow released, persistence verified via subsequent GET.
KYC submit with id-only docs sets requested_level=2; adding address pushes to level 3 and approve grants badge_verified=true (confirmed via /api/admin/sellers).
Frontend AuthContext reads localStorage only at mount. Test scripts that inject token after page load must force a reload to refresh user context (test-side note, not an app bug).

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (Messages, Wallet, KYC, Scan(camera mode), Admin Disputes, Admin Geo all OK; Seller Dashboard quick-action testids missing)

test_credentials: Admin +243000000001 | Seller +243812900001 (Click Collect Test, 23250 FC available) | Buyers +243812900002 / +243812900003. All via /api/auth/send-otp then /api/auth/verify-otp using otp_dev field. Existing seed product 37b794df-9a0e-491f-a00b-33d645b2e45c (Sac mode) used in tests.
seed_data_creation: No new seed accounts created in DB by tests (existing seller +243812900001 and buyer +243812900002 reused via OTP login). The pytest suite creates ephemeral TEST_P2_* users tagged with random UUIDs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend curl works fine, but rapid auth calls from external IPs can trigger brute-force lockout (HTTP 403). Prefer reusing seeded phones via send-otp instead of registering new users repeatedly. For browser UI tests, use page.request.* (browser context) rather than urllib to avoid being lockout-blacklisted. To exercise buyer OrderDetail flows reliably, set localStorage BEFORE first navigation OR reload after setting, otherwise React AuthContext keeps user=null and conditional buttons (chat-with-seller-btn, open-dispute-btn, qr-code-section) won't render. Seller Dashboard's quick-action testids are the only known UI gap to retest after fix.
rca of the issue: Seller Dashboard quick-actions missing: Phase 2 spec lists three quick-action testids (quick-wallet, quick-scan, quick-kyc). Inspection of the rendered DOM at /seller/dashboard returned only [top-header, logo-link, messages-indicator, notifications-btn, kyc-notice, add-product-quick-btn, recent-order-*, bottom-nav-*]. grep across /app/frontend/src for those three testids returned zero matches — i.e. the quick-action UI block was never added to /app/frontend/src/pages/seller/Dashboard.jsx. Fix: add a 3-button row in Dashboard.jsx linking to /seller/wallet, /seller/scan, /seller/kyc with the corresponding data-testid attributes.
